  "findings": [
    "Undersized motor overload protection staged for installation"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged undersized overload heaters/relays",
    "Calculate correct overload sizing based on motor nameplate Full-Load Amps (FLA) and Service Factor (SF) per NEC Article 430 Part III",
    "Procure and stage correctly rated overload protection devices before work begins"
  ],
  "rationale": "Staging undersized motor overloads will lead to nuisance tripping during normal motor operation, or if forced to run, can damage the motor or control circuit. Overload protection must be sized strictly in accordance with NEC Article 430, Part III (typically 115% to 125% of the motor nameplate FLA depending on the service factor and temperature rise).",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430 Part III",
    "NEC Section 430.32"
  ]
}
